creator: info@martenvijn.nl
text:
System daemons (syslog / sshd ) fail due a non populated /var/. This caused by missing file /etc/mtree/BSD.var.dist	. 
For sshd /etc/ssh/* is missing.

Fix: 

adding the mentioned file to the configurations files.




see http://martenvijn.nl/trac/wiki/TinyBSD

kind regards,

Marten Vijn
How-To-Repeat: 
Removing these file will show the problem agian.
